# ENT-9107

Timeline fixture: `continuation` qualifier (ADR-GOV-0010 D1) — must render the
main-line-carry-forward edge marking (solid, heavier, distinct hue + glyph),
distinct from every other qualifier kind. Integer end (not `present`) so it adds
no living cap and no terminus-undated stub.
